title: Module 04 Phase 4 — Team-Mode Foundation (server-side)
summary: Server-side foundation for team mode: schema additions for actor attribution (created_by_user_id columns), shared RBAC primitives (Tier 2.5 — admin/member/viewer with Clerk role mapping), team-config reader/writer with atomic writes, actor-identity wiring across bridge + MCP server stamping, sync-daemon bidirectional pull (Caveat 1 fix), 12-phase team-migrate CLI engine with rollback + resume + slug-conflict resolution, and architecture doc updates locking the local-only-bridge decision (Caveat 2). Web app surfaces deferred to Phase 4-web pending design system. ADR-014 records the RBAC tier + bridge decision.
